summary: Tested RetailPro POS system - verified new components compile and existing cart flow works. Login flow successful with admin@fmcg.com. Dashboard displays TSh currency correctly (Tanzania). New Sale flow shows customer-first selection. New payment/receipt components exist but are not yet integrated into cart checkout flow as expected.

notes: Intermittent 403 errors on customer search API during automation - likely session token expiration during test automation

login_flow_admin.details: Login as admin@fmcg.com / Admin@2025 works correctly. Redirects to /dashboard.

dashboard_displays_tsh_currency.details: Dashboard shows TSh currency correctly (TSh 0.00 for Today's Sales, TSh 32,000.00 for Total Return)

new_sale_customer_selection_first.details: New Sale page requires customer selection before browsing products. Shows 'Select a Customer' prompt with 'Choose or add a customer to start the sale' message.

customer_selection_modal.details: Customer selection modal works correctly - displays as centered modal on desktop, shows +255 phone prefix for Tanzania, search functionality works, Add New Customer option available.

quick_add_customer_modal.details: Quick Add Customer modal works correctly with Name and Phone fields, +255 prefix shown, Back and Add & Select buttons present.

new_components_exist.details: All new components exist at correct locations: paymentConfig.ts, ThermalReceipt.tsx, SalePaymentModal.tsx, ReceiptModal.tsx, currencyUtils.ts

new_components_compile.details: Frontend is bundling successfully (3399 modules). TypeScript errors in IDE are from node_modules type conflicts and missing tsconfig settings (esModuleInterop), not actual component logic errors. Frontend runs correctly with hot reload.

backend_api_health.details: Backend health check returns ok. Auth API works (login returns token). Products and Customers APIs return data correctly.

features: Mobile money providers for Africa (M-Pesa, Tigo Pesa, Airtel Money, etc.)
Currency symbols and phone codes per country
Professional receipt layout with business info, items, totals, payment info
Print, WhatsApp, Image, PDF action buttons
Responsive modal (bottom sheet on mobile, centered on desktop)
Payment method selection (Cash, Card, Mobile Money, Bank Transfer, Credit, KwikPay)
Mobile money provider selection with chips
New Sale and Done action buttons
Responsive design (mobile bottom sheet, desktop centered)
70+ currency definitions with symbols, decimals, separators

integration_status.note: New components (SalePaymentModal, ReceiptModal, ThermalReceipt) exist but are NOT YET INTEGRATED into the cart checkout flow. This is expected per the main agent's context note: 'New components have been created but not yet integrated into the cart checkout flow. The SalePaymentModal and ReceiptModal components will be integrated in the next step.'

action_items: Integrate SalePaymentModal into cart.tsx checkout flow
Integrate ReceiptModal for post-payment receipt display
Connect payment method selection to existing cart checkout
critical_code_review_comments: New components are well-structured with proper TypeScript interfaces
paymentConfig.ts provides comprehensive country-based payment configuration
currencyUtils.ts has excellent currency handling for global markets
ThermalReceipt.tsx has professional receipt design matching thermal printer standards
SalePaymentModal uses responsive pattern (bottom sheet mobile, centered desktop)
Consider adding data-testid attributes to new components for automated testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% (login, dashboard, new sale flow, customer selection all working)

context_for_next_testing_agent: New payment/receipt components exist at /app/frontend/src/components/checkout/ and /app/frontend/src/components/receipt/ but need to be integrated into /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/cart.tsx. The cart.tsx file is 4280 lines and handles the full POS checkout flow. Customer selection works with +255 Tanzania phone prefix. TSh currency is displayed correctly on dashboard.
